items.claim: He excels at changing his level and executing takedowns.
items.quote: The takedowns are there. He changes the attempts really well.

items.claim: He possesses strong cage wrestling and top pressure that smothers opponents.
items.quote: Once he gets on top, his pressure is pretty darn good and he smothers you.

items.claim: He prioritizes positional control before trapping arms and striking on the ground.
He has good takedown defense of his own.
items.quote: does have good takedown defense of his own.

items.claim: If the fight remains standing, Mike Davis should have a clear advantage and win.
items.quote: If this fight stays on the feet, Davis should absolutely win this fight

items.claim: He is likely to get controlled and smothered either against the cage or on the ground.
items.quote: I think he's going to get smothered whether it be against the cage or on the mat

items.claim: He enters the fight undefeated with a 6-0 record.
He holds a record of 2 wins and 3 losses in the promotion.
items.quote: Brenton Hibero is the guy that they seem to give for debuts because well, he's two and three.
